name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: Route agent work through dynamic workflow artifacts, extensible external CLI adapters, deterministic asset workflows, and Plugin evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route dynamic workflows, planning, research, frontend, and assets.
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an extensible adapter hub for platform-neutral agent dynamic workflows, external CLIs, deterministic generated-asset workflows, and background thread/subagent fanout while preserving the owner agent as the local executor and verifier. It should be considered for non-trivial tasks and explicitly triggered by workflow artifacts, approval gates, subagents/packets, planning/decomposition, stuck/brainstorming, current research/latest info, external critique/risk review, creative direction, frontend/UI/landing page/redesign/animation, browser visual verification, generated icon/sprite sheet slicing, and Grok video requests. The initial adapters are dynamic-workflow, Claude task-gate/thinking-gate, Grok augment, AGY frontend, and asset-slicer. Future CLI adapters can be added as separate skills, scripts, tests, and dispatch rules without renaming the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial work, classify the route; required helper routes need Plugin evidence.
Route workflow/plan/stuck/research/frontend/assets via dynamic-workflow, task-gate, thinking-gate, grok-augment, AGY, or slicer.
Use read-only background threads/subagents as advisory; owner agent keeps edits, verification, commits, and final claims.
